title: Sky Whale Ship
description: [Vanilla+] New type of structures added with whale in the sky
body: Embark on a sky-high adventure with _Sky Whale Ship_, a mod that introduces _4 massive flying whales drifting across the skies!_ These structures serve as living town, loot-filled chests, and hidden secrets on their backs. Some are peaceful, while others harbor hostile creatures ready to defend their territory. Explore, plunder, and perhaps even claim your own floating sanctuary !
